message:
test(oracle): add 22 conformance tests + expression-only subquery eval path

Add 22 new conformance oracle test suites: EXISTS subquery, CASE NULL/nested,
correlated subqueries, NULLIF/IIF, INSERT defaults, REPLACE, compound ORDER/LIMIT,
self-joins, aggregate FILTER, HAVING no GROUP BY, rowid aliases, UPDATE SET subquery,
DELETE subquery WHERE, arithmetic edges, string functions, GROUP_CONCAT separator,
CAST types, savepoint nested, implicit coercion, LIKE ESCAPE, multi-CTE,
recursive CTE patterns, derived table agg, BETWEEN types, ORDER BY expressions,
INSERT...SELECT, aggregate empty table, unary/bitwise operators, UPDATE FROM,
multi-row INSERT, nested subquery positions, boolean logic, GLOB, COALESCE,
CROSS JOIN, ON CONFLICT, NULL-safe comparisons, math functions, cross-type column
compare (known gap documented).

Also add expression-only SELECT subquery eval path: routes expression-only SELECTs
with scalar subqueries through connection-level evaluation instead of VDBE codegen
(which can't resolve CTE table references in subqueries).

Fix Expr::Exists field name: negated → not (matching parser AST definition).

100 conformance oracle ext tests, all pass. 2032+ core tests, 0 failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
